💼 GHANA'S 24-HOUR ECONOMY SAYS IT HAS SIGNED $5.5 BILLION IN DEALS.

The 24-Hour Economy and Accelerated Export Development Secretariat says it has signed $5.5bn worth of joint development agreements with partners — part of a wider $11.5bn project pipeline.

The Secretariat says four of the recent deals alone target more than 160,000 direct jobs, on the way to a stated goal of 1.7 million jobs by the end of 2028. Flagship projects include a $1.45bn solar and battery plant at Buipe and a $250m oil palm complex at Kambonwule.

One important note: these are agreements signed and a pipeline of planned investment — not money already spent. The figures were shared as the Secretariat answered questions from the Minority.

(Source: MyJoyOnline | Graphic | Ghana Business News)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #24HourEconomy #Jobs

Do you think the 24-Hour Economy will deliver these jobs? 👇

💼 Ghana's 24-Hour Economy Secretariat says it has signed $5.5bn in development deals within an $11.5bn pipeline, targeting 160,000+ jobs (goal: 1.7m by 2028). These are agreements signed, not yet disbursed. (Source: MyJoyOnline/Graphic) #GreaterNews #Ghana

⚽ IT'S OFFICIAL: ASANTE KOTOKO HAVE A NEW HEAD COACH. 🔴

The Porcupine Warriors have appointed South African tactician Eric Tinkler as their substantive head coach, effective immediately, ahead of the 2026/27 season.

Tinkler is a big name — a former Bafana Bafana captain who has managed Orlando Pirates and Cape Town City. He will work alongside Director of Football Stanley Menzo.

His appointment ends Kotoko's long search for a substantive coach following Karim Zito's departure.

Chale, the pressure at Kumasi is real. 👀

(Source: Pulse Ghana | GhanaSoccernet | Ghanaian Times)
#GreaterNews #AsanteKotoko #GhanaPremierLeague #Football

Kotoko fans — is Tinkler the right man for the job? 👇

🔴 OFFICIAL: Asante Kotoko have appointed former Bafana Bafana captain Eric Tinkler as their new head coach ahead of the 2026/27 season, ending a long search since Karim Zito left. (Source: Pulse/GhanaSoccernet) #GreaterNews #AsanteKotoko #Football

🇬🇭 MAHAMA WARNS APPOINTEES: MORE RESHUFFLES ARE COMING.

Speaking during his Reset Tour in the Volta Region, President John Mahama has told government appointees to expect further personnel changes — and to be ready to serve at any time.

The President urged appointees to "number their days" and deliver on the government's promises, while defending his approach to running a leaner government.

He signalled that reshuffles would continue where they are needed to get results.

(Source: MyJoyOnline | Pulse Ghana)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #Mahama #Governance

What do you make of the President's message to his appointees? 👇

🇬🇭 President Mahama has told government appointees to expect more reshuffles and to be ready to serve, urging them to deliver on promises during his Reset Tour in the Volta Region. (Source: MyJoyOnline/Pulse) #GreaterNews #Ghana #Mahama

🎭 SINGERS AT A COMEDY AWARDS? GHANA IS TALKING.

The 2026 Ghana Comedy Awards have nominated a string of musicians — Kofi Kinaata, Shatta Wale, Broda Sammy and Prophet Kumchacha among them — in the "Alternative Comic Act" category.

The list has split fans online, with many asking why singers are competing in a comedy scheme. Kinaata's own laughing reaction only added to the buzz.

To be clear: these are nominations. The winners will be decided at the ceremony on 1 August in Accra.

(Source: Yen | NewsGhana | AmeyawDebrah)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #GhanaComedyAwards #Entertainment

Should musicians be nominated in a comedy award? 👇

🌍 BRITAIN IS GETTING A NEW PRIME MINISTER — ANDY BURNHAM.

Andy Burnham, the former mayor of Greater Manchester, has been declared leader of the UK's governing Labour Party — and is set to become Prime Minister on Monday.

He replaces Keir Starmer, who was forced out after a rebellion within his own party. Burnham was the only candidate, backed by the vast majority of Labour MPs.

He has promised to decentralise power away from Westminster and, in his words, to "give people hope back."

For the many Ghanaians living in the UK, this is a change right at the top.

(Source: Al Jazeera | AP | CNN)
#GreaterNews #UK #Burnham #WorldNews

What does a Burnham government mean for Ghanaians in the UK? 👇

📱 5G IS COMING: GHANA OPENS THE DOOR FOR NEW LICENCES.

The National Communications Authority (NCA) has invited telecom operators to apply for 11 spectrum lots across the 700 MHz, 2.3 GHz and 3 GHz bands — the airwaves needed to roll out faster mobile broadband and 5G.

To keep competition fair, market leader MTN will face a 40% price premium on the spectrum it bids for.

Faster, more reliable data could be a big deal for students, businesses and everyday users — if it translates into better service on the ground.

(Source: NCA | MyJoyOnline | TechAfrica)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #5G #Technology

Are you ready for 5G in Ghana? 👇
